title: Reset Tipper Stats Data On The VISU_DATA Screen
summary: Use the Tipper Stats DATA RESET button on the VISU_DATA screen to reset the displayed tipper data to zero.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to reset the Tipper Stats values shown in the Tipper Stats section of the VISU_DATA screen to zero.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to reset data outside the Tipper Stats section.
Do not assume this procedure covers heartbeat statistics, operator statistics, or other HMI reset functions not explicitly documented in this candidate.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the VISU_DATA screen, review the displayed Tipper Stats values, press the DATA RESET button, and verify the values reset to zero.

safety_notes: This candidate is marked support safe.
The documented reset scope is limited to the Tipper Stats section as described by the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the operator station HMI

access_required: Access to the operator station HMI
system_preconditions: The VISU_DATA screen is available on the operator station HMI.
The Tipper Stats section is visible so the DATA RESET button and displayed values can be reviewed.

external_references.quote_or_summary: In the Tipper Stats section, the DATA RESET button resets the data to zero.

visual_references.description: Operator Station HMI VISU_DATA screen showing login controls, message banner, and tipper statistics.

steps.title: Open the VISU_DATA screen and locate Tipper Stats
steps.purpose: Navigate to the screen section where the Tipper Stats reset control and values are displayed.
steps.instruction: Open the VISU_DATA screen on the operator station HMI and locate the Tipper Stats section.
steps.expected_result: The VISU_DATA screen is open and the Tipper Stats section is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can see the VISU_DATA screen layout and the Tipper Stats area.
steps.failure_condition: The VISU_DATA screen or Tipper Stats section cannot be located or viewed.

actions.label: Open VISU_DATA screen
actions.exact_action: Open the VISU_DATA screen and locate the Tipper Stats section.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_DATA screen layout, login controls, message banner, and tipper statistics area.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the VISU_DATA screen cannot be accessed.
Escalate if the Tipper Stats section is not visible on the VISU_DATA screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: In the Tipper Stats section, the DATA RESET button resets the data to zero.

steps.title: Identify the DATA RESET button
steps.purpose: Confirm the correct reset control before performing the reset.
steps.instruction: Identify the DATA RESET button within the Tipper Stats section.
steps.expected_result: The operator has located the DATA RESET button associated with Tipper Stats.
steps.healthy_condition: The DATA RESET button is visible in the Tipper Stats section.
steps.failure_condition: The DATA RESET button cannot be identified in the Tipper Stats section.

actions.label: Locate DATA RESET button
actions.exact_action: Identify the DATA RESET button within the Tipper Stats section.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tipper Stats section and the DATA RESET button.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the DATA RESET button is not present where expected in the Tipper Stats section.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: In the Tipper Stats section, the DATA RESET button resets the data to zero.

steps.title: Review the displayed Tipper Stats values
steps.purpose: Confirm which displayed values are about to be reset.
steps.instruction: Review the displayed Tipper Stats values that will be reset, including processed tote counts, hospital counts, fault counts, and other listed metrics.
steps.expected_result: The operator has reviewed the currently displayed Tipper Stats values before resetting them.
steps.healthy_condition: The Tipper Stats values are visible and readable before reset.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed Tipper Stats values are not visible or cannot be reviewed before reset.

actions.label: Review Tipper Stats values
actions.exact_action: Review the displayed Tipper Stats values that will be reset, including processed tote counts, hospital counts, fault counts, and other listed metrics.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tipper Stats values such as totes processed, counts sent to the Hospital Station, fault totals since the last reset, and average cycle time.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Tipper Stats values are not displayed or cannot be read.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The nearby text describes the Tipper Stats section, including Totes Processed for left and right tippers, counts sent to the Hospital Station, left and right fault totals since the last reset, and average cycle time.
In the Tipper Stats section, the DATA RESET button resets the data to zero.

steps.title: Press the DATA RESET button
steps.purpose: Reset the displayed Tipper Stats data to zero.
steps.instruction: Press the DATA RESET button in the Tipper Stats section to reset the data to zero.
steps.expected_result: The Tipper Stats reset action is initiated from the VISU_DATA screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The reset command is accepted and the Tipper Stats values begin reflecting the reset state.
steps.failure_condition: Pressing the DATA RESET button does not reset the displayed Tipper Stats values to zero.

actions.label: Reset Tipper Stats data
actions.exact_action: Press the DATA RESET button to reset the data to zero.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tipper Stats section and DATA RESET button used to reset the displayed data.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the DATA RESET button does not reset the displayed Tipper Stats values to zero.
Stop and seek clarification if a confirmation prompt appears, because the source does not state whether any confirmation prompt appears.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: In the Tipper Stats section, the DATA RESET button resets the data to zero.

steps.title: Verify the values reset to zero
steps.instruction: Verify that the resettable Tipper Stats values display zero after the reset.
steps.expected_result: The resettable Tipper Stats values display zero.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed Tipper Stats values that are reset by the DATA RESET button show zero after the action.
steps.failure_condition: One or more resettable Tipper Stats values do not display zero after the reset.

actions.label: Verify zeroed values
actions.exact_action: Verify that the resettable Tipper Stats values display zero after the reset.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tipper Stats values after pressing DATA RESET to confirm they display zero.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed Tipper Stats values do not reset to zero.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: In the Tipper Stats section, the DATA RESET button resets the data to zero.

success_criteria: The Tipper Stats data on the VISU_DATA screen is reset to zero.
The resettable Tipper Stats values display zero after the reset.
healthy_conditions: The VISU_DATA screen is accessible on the operator station HMI.
The Tipper Stats section and DATA RESET button are visible.
The resettable Tipper Stats values display zero after the reset.
failure_conditions: The VISU_DATA screen or Tipper Stats section cannot be accessed or viewed.
The DATA RESET button cannot be identified in the Tipper Stats section.
Pressing the DATA RESET button does not reset the displayed Tipper Stats values to zero.
A confirmation prompt may appear, but the source does not document its behavior.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the DATA RESET button does not reset the displayed Tipper Stats values to zero.
Escalate if the VISU_DATA screen, Tipper Stats section, or DATA RESET button cannot be accessed or identified.
Seek SME clarification if a confirmation prompt appears, because the source does not state whether any confirmation prompt appears.
